name: Prometheus X Growth Operator
description: Operating playbook for running and promoting the Prometheus X/Twitter account with taste, consistency, and safe autonomy. Triggers on: run the Prometheus Twitter page, promote Prometheus on X, create a Prometheus social operator, manage the Prometheus X account, draft Prometheus tweets, build Prometheus audience, social media subagent, X growth agent, Twitter growth agent, daily X posting, reply to AI builders on X, and market Prometheus publicly. Use this when a subagent or Prometheus itself needs to post, draft, reply, research, or build presence for the Prometheus product account without sounding like generic AI marketing.

resources.description: Checklist for each Prometheus X growth run.
Approval packet format for proposed Prometheus X posts and replies.
Starter examples of Prometheus X posts in the desired voice.
Suggested X search queries and target conversation areas.
